The concept of tzimtzum is central to Kabbalah.

Each sefirah represents a divine attribute.

In Hebrew, צמצום refers to divine contraction.

The divine light fills all of creation.

```
tzimtzum in a code block should be skipped
sefirah also skipped here
```

The term contraction was once used but is now deprecated.

The doctrine of TZIMTZUM appears in many texts.

The ספירה is discussed in the Zohar.
